title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, discusses how he bootstrapped to $10M ARR without funding. The interview covers his playbook for reaching $1M ARR in 117 days, including strategies on product-led growth, SEO, pricing experimentation, churn reduction, and founder decisions around raising capital and team structure.
